## Checklist

- [ ] My branch follows the repo naming convention
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] I ran `npm run check`
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated docs or env guidance if setup/architecture changed
- [ ] I reviewed the security impact of this change
- [ ] I kept the change scoped and reviewable
